llm_advice.rationale: The baseline uses three separate ATen/cuBLAS launches. The rank-16 update (A @ (B.T @ X)) is a small-K GEMM that can be efficiently fused into a single custom kernel that adds directly to the output of W @ X, reducing launch overhead and memory traffic. Keeping cuBLAS for the large W @ X ensures stability. We will explore tiled kernels with increasing optimization levels.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
